# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

# Elasticsearch Snapshot Configuration for Automated Backups

# S3 Repository Configuration
s3_repository:
  name: "s3_backup_repository"
  type: "s3"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-backups"
    region: "us-east-1"
    base_path: "snapshots/production"
    compress: true
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false
    server_side_encryption: true
    storage_class: "standard_ia"
    canned_acl: "private"

# File Share Repository Configuration
file_repository:
  name: "file_backup_repository"
  type: "fs"
  settings:
    location: "/mnt/elasticsearch_backups"
    compress: true
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false
    max_number_of_snapshots: 100

# Azure Blob Storage Repository Configuration (Alternative)
azure_repository:
  name: "azure_backup_repository"
  type: "azure"
  settings:
    container: "elasticsearch-snapshots"
    base_path: "backups/production"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false

# GCS Repository Configuration (Alternative)
gcs_repository:
  name: "gcs_backup_repository"
  type: "gcs"
  settings:
    bucket: "elasticsearch-backups"
    base_path: "snapshots/production"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
    readonly: false

# Snapshot Lifecycle Management (SLM) Policies
slm_policies:
  daily_snapshot:
    name: "daily-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 30 1 * * ?"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        policy: "daily-snapshots"
    retention:
      expire_after: "30d"
      min_count: 7
      max_count: 30

  weekly_snapshot:
    name: "weekly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 0 2 ? * SUN"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        policy: "weekly-snapshots"
    retention:
      expire_after: "90d"
      min_count: 4
      max_count: 12

  monthly_snapshot:
    name: "monthly-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 0 3 1 * ?"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: true
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        policy: "monthly-snapshots"
    retention:
      expire_after: "365d"
      min_count: 12
      max_count: 24

  hourly_critical_snapshot:
    name: "hourly-critical-snapshots"
    schedule: "0 0 * * * ?"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    config:
      indices: ["critical-*", "logs-production-*"]
      ignore_unavailable: true
      include_global_state: false
      partial: false
      metadata:
        taken_by: "slm"
        policy: "hourly-critical-snapshots"
    retention:
      expire_after: "7d"
      min_count: 24
      max_count: 168

# Manual Snapshot Configuration
manual_snapshots:
  full_cluster:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "full-cluster-{now/d}"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    metadata:
      taken_by: "manual"
      description: "Full cluster backup"

  specific_indices:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "indices-{now/d}"
    indices: ["logs-*", "metrics-*", "traces-*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false
    metadata:
      taken_by: "manual"
      description: "Specific indices backup"

  critical_data:
    repository: "file_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "critical-{now/d}"
    indices: ["critical-*"]
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: true
    metadata:
      taken_by: "manual"
      description: "Critical data backup"

# Restore Configuration
restore_operations:
  full_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "full-cluster-2024.01.01"
    indices: ["*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: true
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    wait_for_completion: false
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 1
    ignore_index_settings:
      - "index.refresh_interval"

  partial_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "indices-2024.01.01"
    indices: ["logs-2024.01.*"]
    ignore_unavailable: true
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: true
    partial: false
    rename_pattern: "(.+)"
    rename_replacement: "restored-$1"
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 0

  point_in_time_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_name: "daily-snapshots-2024.01.01"
    indices: ["critical-transactions"]
    ignore_unavailable: false
    include_global_state: false
    include_aliases: false
    partial: false
    rename_pattern: "critical-transactions"
    rename_replacement: "critical-transactions-restored"
    index_settings:
      index.number_of_replicas: 1
      index.refresh_interval: "30s"

# Snapshot Monitoring and Alerts
monitoring:
  snapshot_status_check:
    enabled: true
    interval: "5m"
    alerts:
      - condition: "snapshot_in_progress > 4h"
        severity: "warning"
        action: "notify_operations"
      - condition: "snapshot_failed"
        severity: "critical"
        action: "page_oncall"
      - condition: "last_successful_snapshot > 25h"
        severity: "critical"
        action: "page_oncall"

  repository_health:
    enabled: true
    interval: "15m"
    checks:
      - disk_space_available
      - repository_accessibility
      - snapshot_count
      - total_repository_size

  retention_monitoring:
    enabled: true
    interval: "1d"
    alerts:
      - condition: "snapshot_count > max_count"
        severity: "warning"
        action: "cleanup_old_snapshots"

# Cleanup and Retention Policies
cleanup_policies:
  auto_delete:
    enabled: true
    rules:
      - pattern: "hourly-*"
        keep_last: 168
        older_than: "7d"
      - pattern: "daily-*"
        keep_last: 30
        older_than: "30d"
      - pattern: "weekly-*"
        keep_last: 12
        older_than: "90d"
      - pattern: "monthly-*"
        keep_last: 24
        older_than: "365d"

  manual_cleanup:
    delete_by_age: "90d"
    delete_by_pattern: "test-*"
    keep_minimum: 5

# Elasticsearch Configuration for Snapshots
elasticsearch_config:
  path:
    repo:
      - "/mnt/elasticsearch_backups"
      - "/mnt/secondary_backups"
  
  repositories:
    s3:
      client: "default"
      access_key: "${AWS_ACCESS_KEY}"
      secret_key: "${AWS_SECRET_KEY}"
    
    azure:
      account: "${AZURE_STORAGE_ACCOUNT}"
      key: "${AZURE_STORAGE_KEY}"
    
    gcs:
      client: "default"
      credentials_file: "/path/to/gcs-credentials.json"

# Backup Validation
validation:
  test_restore:
    enabled: true
    schedule: "0 0 4 ? * MON"
    repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    snapshot_pattern: "daily-snapshots-*"
    test_cluster: "test-cluster"
    indices_sample: 5
    cleanup_after_test: true

  integrity_check:
    enabled: true
    schedule: "0 0 5 * * ?"
    verify_all_snapshots: false
    verify_latest: true

# Disaster Recovery Configuration
disaster_recovery:
  cross_region_replication:
    enabled: true
    source_repository: "s3_backup_repository"
    target_repositories:
      - name: "s3_backup_repository_dr"
        region: "us-west-2"
        bucket: "elasticsearch-backups-dr"
    replication_schedule: "0 0 6 * * ?"

  emergency_restore:
    repository: "s3_backup_repository_dr"
    priority_indices:
      - "critical-*"
      - "production-*"
    restore_order: "priority"
    parallel_restore: false

# Operations Team Configuration
operations_config:
  notifications:
    email:
      enabled: true
      recipients:
        - "ops-team@company.com"
        - "elasticsearch-admin@company.com"
      events:
        - "snapshot_started"
        - "snapshot_completed"
        - "snapshot_failed"
        - "restore_started"
        - "restore_completed"
        - "restore_failed"
    
    slack:
      enabled: true
      webhook_url: "${SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL}"
      channel: "#elasticsearch-ops"
      events:
        - "snapshot_failed"
        - "restore_completed"
        - "repository_error"
    
    pagerduty:
      enabled: true
      service_key: "${PAGERDUTY_KEY}"
      events:
        - "snapshot_failed"
        - "restore_failed"
        - "repository_unavailable"

  access_control:
    snapshot_create:
      - "ops-team"
      - "elasticsearch-admin"
    snapshot_restore:
      - "elasticsearch-admin"
      - "senior-ops"
    repository_management:
      - "elasticsearch-admin"

# Performance Tuning
performance:
  snapshot_settings:
    max_concurrent_snapshots: 2
    max_restore_bytes_per_sec: "200mb"
    max_snapshot_bytes_per_sec: "200mb"
    compress: true
    chunk_size: "100mb"
  
  throttling:
    snapshot_throttle: "100mb"
    restore_throttle: "100mb"
    indices_recovery_max_bytes_per_sec: "100mb"

# Documentation and Runbooks
documentation:
  snapshot_procedures:
    create_manual_snapshot: |
      curl -X PUT "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/snapshot_name?wait_for_completion=true"
    
    list_snapshots: |
      curl -X GET "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/_all"
    
    restore_snapshot: |
      curl -X POST "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/snapshot_name/_restore"
    
    delete_snapshot: |
      curl -X DELETE "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/snapshot_name"
    
    check_snapshot_status: |
      curl -X GET "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/snapshot_name/_status"

  troubleshooting:
    repository_verification: |
      curl -X POST "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/_verify"
    
    cleanup_failed_snapshots: |
      curl -X DELETE "localhost:9200/_snapshot/s3_backup_repository/failed_snapshot_*"

# Audit and Compliance
audit:
  logging:
    enabled: true
    log_path: "/var/log/elasticsearch/snapshots"
    retention_days: 90
    events:
      - "snapshot_create"
      - "snapshot_delete"
      - "restore_start"
      - "restore_complete"
      - "repository_changes"
  
  compliance:
    encryption_at_rest: true
    encryption_in_transit: true
    access_logging: true
    retention_policy_enforced: true
